description: CRIT-EC-001 requires all 28 EC IDs (EC-S-001..016, EC-T-001..005, EC-C-001..007) to appear as named test cases. Audit of every test file shows 7 EC IDs have NO occurrence as a named test case: EC-S-001 (empty string SearchApplied — the empty-needle behavior is asserted as 'PROP-FILTER-002d' but the EC label is not used), EC-S-003 (very long query — only EC-S-012 is labeled, despite being a separate ID in §4.1), EC-S-004 (special regex chars literal — only EC-S-015 is labeled), EC-S-006 (note saved while search active — referenced as 'PROP-FILTER-007b' but EC-S-006 label is absent), EC-T-004 (already in FIND-PHASE3-001), EC-C-002 (search active then tag toggled — no test labeled), EC-C-007 (already in FIND-PHASE3-001). Pass threshold of CRIT-EC-001 ('grep -r EC-... returns at least one match per EC ID') therefore fails for 7 of 28 IDs.
